## Summary

Describe the user-visible or engineering change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Relevant unit/integration/E2E tests
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] English/Persian and mobile impact reviewed when applicable

## Security and scope

- [ ] No secret, private roadmap, credential, or fetched HTML was committed
- [ ] Security limits were not weakened
- [ ] The change remains inside the free public release scope
